metadata.description: Multi-chat orchestration for Claude Code. Single-plugin marketplace.

plugins.name: claude-bridge
plugins.description: MCP server for cross-Claude-Code-chat orchestration + optional control-plane daemon. Bridge features (all versions): peer messaging, chat read/search, live context + rate-limits monitoring via chained statusLine wrapper + PostToolUse OAuth hook, peer_set_context_guard + peer_set_rate_limit_guard, idle-beep notification, bundled role skills. v0.10.0-rc adds an opt-in control-plane daemon (`install --systemd`) that supervises peer lifecycle: peer_spawn/stop/restart with sanitized env + fork-guard, peer_compact orchestration (charter §8 audited path — auto-watchdog OFF default), team_layout declarative reconcile, lifecycle event routing into offline subscriber inboxes. Without the daemon the plugin behaves as v0.9.4 — no regression. v0.10.0-rc.2 fixes two bugs from the rc.1 live test: session names containing `:` / `.` now canonicalize to safe tmux targets end-to-end (T1), and peer_stop is idempotent when the host session already vanished (T2). See docs/SETUP-DAEMON.md and ADR-008 in docs/architecture.md. **This is a pre-release (rc)** — stable 0.10.0 will follow after live operation and owner GO.
